svg.text: Best run AL-20260329-030 reached 1.3564 val_bpb. 39 scored runs are tracked here, with 13 kept and 26 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260330-005 (discard) tested if stronger clipping and faster head updates are both the right local directions, the combination may stack into one more immediate frontier gain.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
